nodes.name: RoomGrpcEndpoint.java
nodes.summary: gRPC service endpoint exposing Room domain operations (enter/leave/invite/kick/ban/change-role/notice/direct-chat) to callers such as the websocket-gateway, delegating to RoomCommandUseCase and converting results with DtoToGrpcConverter.
nodes.languageNotes: Each RPC method follows a uniform try/catch pattern: build a command DTO from the request, delegate to the use case, convert the response DTO to gRPC via DtoToGrpcConverter, and map failures to gRPC Status.INTERNAL.

nodes.name: RoomGrpcEndpoint
nodes.summary: gRPC service implementation class that wires incoming Room protobuf requests to RoomCommandUseCase and streams back protobuf responses via a StreamObserver.

nodes.name: openDirectChatRoom
nodes.summary: RPC handler that opens or resolves a 1:1 direct chat room between the requester and a friend, converting the result to a gRPC response.

nodes.name: enterRoom
nodes.summary: RPC handler that loads room entry details (members, notice) for a requester entering a room.

nodes.name: leftRoom
nodes.summary: RPC handler that processes a member leaving a room and returns a feed entry describing the departure.

nodes.name: inviteMember
nodes.summary: RPC handler that invites one or more members into a room and returns a feed entry describing the invite.

nodes.name: kickMember
nodes.summary: RPC handler that removes a target member from a room and returns a feed entry describing the kick.

nodes.name: banMember
nodes.summary: RPC handler that bans a target member from a room and returns a feed entry describing the ban.

nodes.name: changeMemberRole
nodes.summary: RPC handler that changes a target member's role within a room and returns a feed entry describing the change.

nodes.name: applyRoomNotice
nodes.summary: RPC handler that applies a create/update/inactivate/reactivate/delete action to a room notice and returns the resulting notice view plus feed entry.

nodes.name: RoomMapper.java
nodes.summary: MyBatis mapper interface providing SQL-backed persistence operations for room notices, room membership, and room lookups used by RoomCommandService.
nodes.languageNotes: MyBatis mapper interface: method bodies are SQL-mapped externally, so the extraction script reports zero function bodies despite 24 declared methods.

nodes.name: RoomMapper
nodes.summary: Mapper interface with 24 methods covering room notice CRUD/lifecycle, room lookup for enter/direct-chat flows, member profile queries, and membership mutations (invite/kick/ban/role change).

nodes.name: RoomCommandService.java
nodes.summary: Core business-logic service implementing all Room domain commands (notices, direct-chat opening, enter/leave, member invite/kick/ban/role-change), including validation, ownership checks, and feed-entry generation.
nodes.languageNotes: Implements RoomCommandUseCase; centralizes room-notice state machine validation (CREATE/UPDATE/INACTIVATE/REACTIVATE/DELETE) and reuses a shared createRoomFeed helper to emit uniform activity-feed entries for every membership mutation.

nodes.name: RoomCommandService
nodes.summary: Service class implementing RoomCommandUseCase; orchestrates RoomMapper (SQL), ChatMapper, and RoomMemberCache to fulfill room notice, direct-chat, entry, and membership commands.

nodes.name: applyRoomNotice
nodes.summary: Dispatches a room-notice command to the appropriate lifecycle operation (create/update/inactivate/reactivate/delete) after base validation, then creates a feed entry.

nodes.name: createRoomNotice
nodes.summary: Validates and creates a new room notice, inactivating any currently active notice for the room first.

nodes.name: updateRoomNotice
nodes.summary: Validates ownership and updates the content/type of an existing, non-deleted room notice.

nodes.name: inactivateRoomNotice
nodes.summary: Validates ownership and transitions an active room notice to inactive status.

nodes.name: reactivateRoomNotice
nodes.summary: Validates ownership and reactivates an inactive room notice, first deactivating any currently active notice.

nodes.name: deleteRoomNotice
nodes.summary: Validates ownership and marks a room notice as deleted.

nodes.name: validateBase
nodes.summary: Validates the common required fields (room id, action, requester ids) present on every room-notice command.

nodes.name: validateCreate
nodes.summary: Validates the fields required specifically for creating a room notice (type and content, with message-source consistency).

nodes.name: validateNoticeTypeIfPresent
nodes.summary: Validates the notice type and message-source consistency only when a type is supplied on an update command.

nodes.name: findAndValidateOwner
nodes.summary: Looks up a target room notice's status and confirms the requester is its owner before allowing mutation.

nodes.name: validateNoticeOwner
nodes.summary: Confirms the requester user id matches the recorded requester of the given room notice.

nodes.name: createDirectRoom
nodes.summary: Creates a new direct-chat room, inserts both participants as members, and seeds the room-member cache.

nodes.name: reactivateDirectMembers
nodes.summary: Reactivates previously-left direct-chat members in the database and reconciles the room-member cache with any missing member ids.

nodes.name: openDirectChatRoom
nodes.summary: Resolves whether a direct-chat room already exists between requester and friend; if so returns enter-room info, otherwise returns a draft for creating one.

nodes.name: enterRoom
nodes.summary: Validates a requester belongs to a room and assembles the enter-room response with member profiles and active notice.

nodes.name: leftRoom
nodes.summary: Removes the requester from a room's membership and produces a feed entry announcing their departure.

nodes.name: inviteMember
nodes.summary: Validates the requester's standing, inserts new invited members into the room, and produces a feed entry naming the invited members.

nodes.name: kickMember
nodes.summary: Validates the requester's standing, removes a target member from the room, and produces a feed entry describing the kick.

nodes.name: banMember
nodes.summary: Validates the requester's standing, bans a target member from the room, and produces a feed entry describing the ban.

nodes.name: changeMemberRole
nodes.summary: Validates the requester's standing and changes a target member's role, producing a feed entry describing the role change.

nodes.name: validateRoomRequester
nodes.summary: Shared guard verifying the room id and requester ids on a membership-mutation command are present.

nodes.name: DtoToGrpcConverter.java
nodes.summary: Static converter that maps internal Room/Friend response DTOs into their corresponding gRPC protobuf message builders for the channel-engine gRPC endpoints.
nodes.languageNotes: Uses an `nvl` null-safe helper to coerce null String fields to empty strings before setting protobuf builder fields, since protobuf setters reject null.

nodes.name: DtoToGrpcConverter
nodes.summary: Utility class holding static DTO-to-gRPC conversion methods for room and friend response DTOs used by channel-engine's gRPC endpoints.

nodes.name: convertEnterRoomResDtoToGrpc
nodes.summary: Converts an EnterRoomResponseDTO (room info, member profiles, active notice) into the gRPC EnterRoomResponse message.

nodes.name: convertOpenDirectChatRoomResDtoToGrpc
nodes.summary: Converts an OpenDirectChatRoomResponseDTO into the gRPC OpenDirectChatRoomResponse message, embedding the enter-room info or a direct-chat draft.

nodes.name: convertRoomNoticeViewResDtoToGrpc
nodes.summary: Converts a RoomNoticeViewDTO into the gRPC RoomNoticeView message.

nodes.name: convertRoomFeedResDtoToGrpc
nodes.summary: Converts a RoomFeedResponseDTO (feed type, actors, text, timestamp) into the gRPC RoomFeedResponse message.

nodes.name: convertRoomNoticeApplyResDtoToGrpc
nodes.summary: Converts a RoomNoticeApplyResponseDTO into the gRPC RoomNoticeApplyResponse message by composing the notice view and feed conversions.

nodes.name: convertFriendEventResDtoToGrpc
nodes.summary: Converts a FriendEventResponseDTO into the gRPC FriendEventResponse message.

nodes.name: convertOnlineFriendTargetsResDtoToGrpc
nodes.summary: Converts an OnlineFriendTargetsResponseDTO into the gRPC OnlineFriendTargetsResponse message.

nodes.name: RoomCommandUseCase.java
nodes.summary: Use-case port interface declaring the Room domain operations (direct-chat, enter/leave, membership, notices) that RoomGrpcEndpoint depends on and RoomCommandService implements.

nodes.name: RoomCommandUseCase
nodes.summary: Interface with 8 method signatures (openDirectChatRoom, enterRoom, leftRoom, inviteMember, kickMember, banMember, changeMemberRole, applyRoomNotice) forming the Room use-case port implemented by RoomCommandService.

nodes.name: RoomCreateCommandUseCase.java
nodes.summary: A second use-case port interface mirroring the same Room command method surface as RoomCommandUseCase, likely segregated for a distinct consumer or bounded-context seam.

nodes.name: RoomCreateCommandUseCase
nodes.summary: Interface declaring the same 8 Room command methods as RoomCommandUseCase, used as an alternate/segregated use-case port.

nodes.name: RoomFeedCommandUseCase.java
nodes.summary: A third use-case port interface mirroring the same Room command method surface, likely scoped to feed-generation consumers.

nodes.name: RoomFeedCommandUseCase
nodes.summary: Interface declaring the same 8 Room command methods as RoomCommandUseCase, used as an alternate/segregated use-case port.

nodes.name: RoomNoticeCommandUseCase.java
nodes.summary: Narrow use-case port interface exposing only the applyRoomNotice operation, a focused seam for room-notice-only consumers.

nodes.name: RoomNoticeCommandUseCase
nodes.summary: Single-method interface declaring applyRoomNotice, a focused port for room-notice application logic.

nodes.name: ApplyRoomNoticeCommand.java
nodes.summary: Shared contract command DTO carrying the fields needed to create/update/inactivate/reactivate/delete a room notice, used across channel-engine and websocket-gateway.

nodes.name: ApplyRoomNoticeCommand
nodes.summary: Command DTO with roomId, roomNoticeAction, targetRoomNoticeId, roomNoticeType, sourceMessageId, roomNoticeContents, requesterUserId, and requesterPublicId fields.
